name: phantombot
description: Route VS Code's assistant through your Phantombot agent — same persona, memory, tools, and model routing as your Telegram/PhantomChat bot.

chatParticipants.name: phantombot
chatParticipants.description: Ask your Phantombot agent — same persona, memory, and tools as your Telegram bot.

phantombot.persona.description: Persona override (default: the configured default persona).

phantombot.path.description: Path to the phantombot binary. Default: 'phantombot' on PATH.

phantombot.autoContext.description: Automatically include active file context and diagnostics.

phantombot.maxContextFiles.description: Maximum number of open files to include in workspace context.

phantombot.conversationPersistence.description: Persist conversation history across VS Code sessions.
